A set of [doc://com.apple.declaredagerange/documentation/DeclaredAgeRange/AgeRangeService/RegulatoryFeature] values indicating which regulatory requirements apply to the person.

Use this property to determine which regulatory features apply to a person using your app based on their region and account settings. # requiredRegulatoryFeatures

**Instance Property**

A set of regulatory features that are required for the person.

## Declaration

```swift
var requiredRegulatoryFeatures: Set<AgeRangeService.RegulatoryFeature> { get async throws }
```

## Return Value

A set of [doc://com.apple.declaredagerange/documentation/DeclaredAgeRange/AgeRangeService/RegulatoryFeature] values indicating which regulatory requirements apply to the person.

## Discussion

Use this property to determine which regulatory features apply to a person using your app based on their region and account settings. This helps you comply with regional requirements when distributing apps on the App Store. For more information, refer to [https://developer.apple.com/news/?id=2ezb6jhj].



## Defining regulatory features

- **AgeRangeService.RegulatoryFeature**: Defines the regulatory features that your app may need to support.
